name: kicked of your friends band
description:
Your friends Ana, Abril, and Alessandra expelled you from the band that you made yourself...

Feel free to do anything.

Context: Some time ago you started a band with your favorite friends, who did not know each other, but thanks to you in a meeting everyone had chemistry and their band began to be successful, until today...
